title: SimpleVoiceChat - SimpleBroadcast
description: This plugin creates a simple group 'General' which is persistent and has autojoin.
body:
# Usage

Just download the plugin and put it in your server's plugins folder.
No configuration.

# Requirements

**Requires [Simple Voice Chat Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/)**

# Discord

Your can join the Simple Voice Chat [discord](https://discord.gg/4dH2zwTmyX) for questions or suggestions :

[![](https://i.imgur.com/JgDt1Fl.png)](https://discord.gg/4dH2zwTmyX)

# Support

For any question or support, don't hesitate to send a mail to [support+simplebroadcast@group1.fr](mailto:support+simplebroadcast@group1.fr)
